title: Rewrite endpoint.ex with all sandbox requirements satisfied
prompt: Write a complete `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex` that satisfies ALL these constraints: (1) `use Phoenix.Endpoint, otp_app: :my_app`, (2) defines `@session_options` as a module attribute, (3) `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox` plug at the very TOP (after @session_options but before any other plug, conditional on `Application.compile_env(:my_app, :sql_sandbox, false)`), (4) LiveView socket at `/live` with `connect_info: [:user_agent, session: @session_options]`, (5) channel socket at `/socket` with `connect_info: [:user_agent]`, (6) all standard plugs in correct Phoenix order (Plug.Static, RequestId, Telemetry, Parsers, MethodOverride, Head, Session), (7) `plug MyAppWeb.Router` at the end. The endpoint must work for both LiveView AND channel tests with sandbox.
tier_rationale: Full endpoint file with 9 constraints. Any missing constraint fails.
research_citation: "It's important that this is at the top of `endpoint.ex`, before any other plugs." — Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox docs
